Home / Service Areas / Tempe

Garage door repair in Tempe, AZ

Trusted local professionals serving Tempe and surrounding communities

Serving Tempe, AZ

Discount Garage Door Repair of Mesa Arizona is dedicated to providing exceptional garage door services to the vibrant community of Tempe, Arizona. Home to Arizona State University, Tempe features a mix of older and newer homes, many of which are near the university campus. We understand the unique needs of Tempe homeowners and offer tailored solutions to keep your garage door functioning flawlessly. Our experienced technicians are skilled at repairing and maintaining all types of garage doors, ensuring the safety and security of your property. We offer prompt and reliable service, as well as a wide selection of new garage doors to enhance the curb appeal of your Tempe home. Count on Discount Garage Door Repair for affordable and professional service in Tempe.

Tempe is a university town with diverse housing near ASU, where reliable garage doors are essential for student and resident safety and convenience amidst the extreme summer heat.

Garage door repair Services in Tempe

Garage Door Spring Repair

Expert repair and replacement of broken or worn garage door springs.

Learn more →

Garage Door Opener Repair

Reliable repair and replacement of garage door openers of all makes and models.

Learn more →

Garage Door Cable Repair

Expert repair and replacement of damaged or frayed garage door cables.

Learn more →

Garage Door Roller Replacement

Smooth and quiet garage door operation with our professional roller replacement service.

Learn more →

Garage Door Panel Replacement

Restore your garage door's appearance and functionality with our panel replacement service.

Learn more →

New Garage Door Installation

Upgrade your home with a new, high-quality garage door from Discount Garage Door Repair.

Learn more →

Emergency Garage Door Repair

24/7 emergency garage door repair services in Mesa and surrounding areas.

Learn more →
